CONTENT.Club career: On 4 March 2022, Łęgowski scored a goal Pogoń Szczecin against Radomiak Radom during the 76th minute, resulting on a 4-0 victory for his club.On 17 August 2023, Łęgowski signed for Serie A club Salernitana with a contract valid until 2026. He made his debut on 21 August in an away match against AS Roma, which ended in a 2-2 draw. On September 30, 2023, he scored a goal against Inter Milan that was disallowed due to offsides.
CONTENT.Personal life: Łęgowski has a twin brother named Łukasz who is three minutes younger than him.
CONTENT.External links: Mateusz Łęgowski at the US Salernitana 1919 websiteMateusz Łęgowski at SoccerwayMateusz Łęgowski at 90minut.pl (in Polish)
CONTENT.International career: In September 2022, Łęgowski was called up to the Polish senior squad for upcoming 2022–23 UEFA Nations League A matches against the Netherlands and Wales. He debuted in the match against the former on 22 September.

SUMMARY: Mateusz Łęgowski (born 29 January 2003) is a Polish professional footballer who plays as a defensive midfielder for Salernitana and the Poland national team.
